description_long: This object is a compact shotgun with a modern, angular design and a short barrel. The upper receiver and barrel are matte black with visible surface scratches, and the top features two green fiber optic sights for aiming. The grip and lower frame are made of wood with a dark, textured grip panel for improved handling, and a red trigger is visible within a squared trigger guard. The overall form is blocky and utilitarian, with no visible external magazine or pump mechanism. The muzzle is hexagonal, and the rear of the object is flat, with the grip extending downward at an ergonomic angle. The shotgun's compact size and robust materials suggest it is designed for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, modern shotgun with a matte black barrel, wooden grip, green fiber optic sights, and a red trigger. The design is angular and utilitarian, with visible wear and a textured grip panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hexagonal muzzle, green fiber optic front sight, and the barrel's matte black finish.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wooden grip, red trigger, squared trigger guard, and the scratched black upper receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back of the receiver, green rear sights, and the top of the wooden grip.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the wooden grip, red trigger, and the black upper receiver with visible scratches.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and hexagonal with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, medium-sized trigger guard with straight edges and no finger grooves
